hook: A boundary is not a threat; it is a line that keeps your self-respect intact.
body: Boundaries give shape to your time, attention, and standards so your yes actually means something.

hook: Many men wait until resentment is high before they try to set limits, which makes the limit come out messier.
body: A clean boundary said early is kinder than a frustrated blowup said late.

hook: A clean boundary said early is kinder than a frustrated blowup said late.
body: Naming that late-night last-minute plans do not work for you can prevent a bigger resentment spiral later.

hook: Naming that late-night last-minute plans do not work for you can prevent a bigger resentment spiral later.
body: State one limit before you are angry enough to state it badly.
